nodes.name: 丘鹬属
nodes.summary: 丘鹬属（Scolopax）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如American woodcock、Amami woodcock、Bukidnon woodcock等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Amami woodcock
nodes.summary: Amami woodcock（Scolopax mira）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Amami woodcock。

nodes.name: 鹬科
nodes.summary: 鹬科（Scolopacidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联71种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、Upland sandpiper、小杓鹬等71种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: Amami woodcock
nodes.summary: The Amami woodcock (Scolopax mira) is a medium-sized wader. It is slightly larger and longer-legged than the Eurasian woodcock. This species is a restricted-range endemic found only in forests on Amami Ōshima, Okinawa and Tokunoshima, including some smaller, nearby islands (Kakeromajima and Tokashiki). Due to the introduction of the invasive small Indian mongoose, their population has been declining. Efforts to control the mongoose population have led to recovery of Amami woodcock, as documented on Amami where the mongoose has been successfully eradicated. Insofar as its habits are known, they are similar to the Eurasian woodcock. Taxonomy and systematics The Amami woodcock was originally described as a subspecies of the Eurasian woodcock, due to a juvenile that resembled the Eurasian woodcock in coloration. Later, some argued that the Amami woodcock was a distinct species—Kobayashi in 1979 and Cramp & Simmons in 1983. Comparison between the two species revealed their distinct physical features, and led to the emergence of the Amami woodcock as a distinct species. References Further reading Shorebirds by Hayman, Marchant and Prater, ISBN 0-7099-2034-2 External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The Amami woodcock (Scolopax mira) is a medium-sized wader. It is slightly larger and longer-legged than the Eurasian woodcock.

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。
